topic: YouTube pipeline test — The 50/30/20 Budget Rule

1_script.title: The 50/30/20 Budget Rule Explained for Beginners (Take Control of Your Money Today)

2_voiceover.elevenlabs_new_key: Missing text_to_speech permission — needs to be enabled at elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys
2_voiceover.fallback: gTTS (Google TTS, free) used instead — 6.7MB audio generated successfully
2_voiceover.note: gTTS audio quality is acceptable for a test upload but ElevenLabs should be used for production

sources: queries: money budget, personal finance, saving money, financial planning, piggy bank, calculator, credit card, salary income

4_video_assembly.issue: Audio is 858 seconds (14 min). Encoding 14 minutes of 720p video takes ~3-5 min on this droplet. Running in tmux:ffmpeg2.

blockers_to_resolve.elevenlabs: Go to elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys, find the 'YT Agent' key, edit permissions, enable 'Text to Speech'. Or create a new key with all permissions.
blockers_to_resolve.video_length: 13-minute videos take significant compute to assemble. Consider using shorter scripts (5-7 min) for faster iteration.

action_taken: Video assembly running in background (tmux:ffmpeg2). Will complete and upload shortly. Check /opt/yt-agent/output/videos/5030_20_budget_final.mp4
